title: $fwrite formats and $time issues
body:
Hi,

I see some problems with $fwrite formats and $time:

my verilog code looks like:
 
```
                    $fwrite (el, "%10t : %6s 0 %h %h %s\n",$time(), $sformatf("#%0d",commit_count), 
                           trace_rv_i_address_ip[31+i*32 -:32], trace_rv_i_insn_ip[31+i*32-:32],
                           wb_dest[i] !=0 ?  $sformatf("r%0d=%h", wb_dest[i], wb_data[i]) : "");
```
irun and vcs prints it this way:

```
       235 :     #1 0 80000000 b0201073 
       245 :     #2 0 80000004 b8201073 
       255 :     #3 0 80000008 ee0000b7 r1=ee000000
```

but verilator ( I use 4.020 version):

```
         0 : #1 0 80000000 b0201073 
         0 : #2 0 80000004 b8201073 
         0 : #3 0 80000008 ee0000b7 r1=ee000000
```
i.e. $time - first field returns always 0,
verilator doesn't honor %6s format (#N field) - prints only visible chars in the string.

Any ideas?
